name: brand-voice-generator
description: Generate brand-system and tone-of-voice files — colors, typography, assets, and writing voice — that power the PPTX Generator and other brand-aware skills.

interface.shortDescription: Generate brand-system and tone-of-voice files — colors, typography, assets, and writing voice — that power the PPTX Generator and other brand-aware skills.
interface.longDescription: Use when defining a brand identity or writing voice for content generation. Walks through brand basics, a ten-color system, typography, assets, voice discovery (five example voice templates from Technical Educator to Contrarian Thinker), and design philosophy, then generates brand.json, config.json, brand-system.md, and tone-of-voice.md — the source-of-truth files consumed by pptx-generator and other brand-aware skills.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use Brand & Voice Generator safely.
